---
title: "STAT 417 Final Code Work"
author: "Nicholas Todd"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  pdf_document: default
  html_document: default
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
```

### Initial data exploration
```{r}
#read the data from the fed website
library(readr)
url <- "https://fred.stlouisfed.org/graph/fredgraph.csv?id=UNRATE"
unrate_data <- read_csv(url)

#convert to time series
unrate_ts <- ts(unrate_data$UNRATE, start = c(1948, 1), frequency = 12)
#interpolate the NA values
library(forecast)
unrate_ts_interp <- na.interp(unrate_ts)
#decompose and plot
unrate_decomp <- decompose(unrate_ts_interp)
plot(unrate_decomp)
#stl and plot
unrate_stl <- stl(unrate_ts_interp, s.window = "periodic")
plot(unrate_stl)
```
